info.description: Vedex backend API. Authenticate via POST /api/v1/auth/login to get a JWT, then pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected endpoints.
info.title: Vedex API

get.description: Returns all non-deleted announcements. Use query params to filter: name (partial match), urgency (low|medium|high), is_active (true|false).

parameters.description: Filter by urgency: low | medium | high
parameters.name: urgency

post.description: Create a new announcement. Description supports rich text (HTML/Markdown). Use POST /upload/image first to get the image_url.

delete.description: Soft-delete an announcement by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained).

patch.description: Partially update an announcement by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change.

post.description: Single login endpoint for all roles. Returns a JWT — send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected requests.
Register a new user. A unique user ID is generated automatically and returned in the response.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted batches with full course and manager details.

post.description: Create a new batch. Restricted to super_admin. A short unique ID is generated automatically. Provide course_short_id to link to a course.

get.description: Filter non-deleted batches by any combination of fields. All query params are optional.

delete.description: Soft-delete a batch by its short_id.

patch.description: Partially update a batch by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active to activate or deactivate. Set additional_manager_id to "" to clear it.

get.description: Returns all active, non-deleted coding questions ordered by creation date.

post.description: Create a new coding practice question. Restricted to super_admin.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted coding questions including inactive ones.
Returns a single active coding question by its short_id.

delete.description: Soft-delete a coding question by its short_id.

patch.description: Partially update a coding question by its short_id.

get.description: Returns all active and inactive non-deleted courses.

post.description: Create a new course. Restricted to super_admin role. A short unique ID is generated automatically.

get.description: Search non-deleted courses by name or description. Pass the search term as query param `q`.

delete.description: Soft-delete a course by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained).

patch.description: Partially update a course by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change. Use is_active to activate or deactivate.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted events ordered newest first. Use query params `name` and `status` to filter results.

parameters.description: Filter by event name (case-insensitive, partial match)
parameters.name: name

post.description: Create a new event. The image_url should be the URL returned after uploading to storage. Description supports rich text (HTML/Markdown).

delete.description: Soft-delete an event by its short_id (sets deleted_at; the row is retained).

patch.description: Partially update an event by its short_id. Send only the fields you want to change.

get.description: Returns all active mentors. Use this to populate the batch manager dropdown.

post.description: Save a code submission for the authenticated user against a coding question.

get.description: Returns every submission with student name, email, and question title.
Returns all submissions made by the authenticated user across all questions.
Returns all submissions by the authenticated user for the given coding question short_id.
get.summary: Get current user's submissions for a specific question

get.description: Returns all submissions for the given user UUID, including question title and user details.
get.summary: List submissions for a specific user (admin/mentor)

post.description: Upload an image from a device file picker or camera capture. Returns the public URL to use in create/update event. Max size 10 MB. Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.

200.description: url: public URL of the uploaded image

get.description: Returns all soft-deleted users (where deleted_at is set).
Search active users by name (first, last, or full), email, phone, or user ID. Pass the term as query param `q`.

delete.description: Soft-delete a user by ID (sets deleted_at; the row is retained in the database).

patch.description: Partially update a user — send only the fields you want to change (first_name, last_name, phone, date_of_birth).
Promotes or changes a user's role. Only super_admin can call this. The old role-specific profile is deleted and a new one is created.

description.example: Important: The platform will be down for 2 hours.

additional_manager_id.example: use GET /mentors to pick a real ID

batch_manager_id.example: use GET /mentors to pick a real ID

description.example: Join us for a hands-on Go workshop.

batch_manager_id.example: use GET /mentors to pick a real ID
